overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction survival horror game. The player character explores a dimly lit industrial spaceship or facility corridor with metal walkways and overhead pipes, discovering an injured NPC lying on the ground and approaching to investigate.

metal safety railings lining the left side of the walkway
metal safety railings lining the right side of the walkway
large industrial ventilation pipes running along the ceiling
hanging industrial light fixtures providing dim illumination

metal stairway structure leading to lower level

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with metal flooring and overhead pipes. Metal railings line both sides of the walkway, while storage racks and equipment are visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial living quarters with bunk beds

events.description: discovers an injured person lying on the walkway ahead near the bunk area
stops walking and stands over the injured NPC to examine their condition

agents.ego_description: approaches the injured NPC and stands over them, examining their condition before moving toward the lit doorway

notable_agents.action: lying injured or deceased on the metal walkway, wearing a red shirt and dark pants

entered.detail: sleeping quarters with bunk beds illuminated by green ambient lighting
equipment crate with possible medical supplies near the railing
open doorway emitting bright light leading to another room

segments.scene_description: The character discovers an injured NPC lying on the walkway near a bunk area with green-lit sleeping quarters. After stopping to examine the person, the character looks toward an open doorway with bright light emanating from it, while medical equipment sits nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that opens into a brightly lit medical area. It begins with a steady walk along a narrow walkway of metal flooring, flanked by railings, overhead pipes, and storage racks. As the character progresses, the dim lighting shifts toward the green glow of a bunk area where an injured NPC lies on the ground. The camera then pauses to examine the fallen figure before turning toward a nearby collection of medical equipment. Finally, the scene expands as the character looks toward an open doorway emanating a stark, bright light.
